observed_problem: The project needs a transparent production-shaped baseline before adding query understanding, semantic search, LTR, personalization, or behavior signals.
decision: Use OpenSearch BM25 over title, abstract, and text as the v0 Cranfield retrieval and ranking baseline.
evidence: Worker endpoint tests validate generated OpenSearch multi_match requests and explain metadata; fixture evaluation validates metric artifact shape.
metrics_after: Fixture evaluator reports MAP 1.0, nDCG@10 1.0, Precision@10 0.8889, Recall@10 1.0, MRR 1.0 on sample data; live metrics pending.
latency_impact: API and OpenSearch took fields are exposed; live latency pending.
indexing_impact: Introduces cranfield-v0 strict OpenSearch mapping and sample bulk payload.
